extract: Litten (Japanese: ニャビー Nyabby) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It evolves into Torracat starting at level 17, which evolves into Incineroar starting at level 34. Along with Rowlet and Popplio, Litten is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Alola available at the beginning of Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon. They were also the second Generation VII Pokémon to be revealed to the public on May 10, 2016, after Magearna.
